titleStmt.title: Letter from Wilfrid Spender to Lillian Spender, circa November 1915
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Wilfrid Spender

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

msIdentifier.repository: Public Record Office of Northern Ireland
msIdentifier.collection: Letters from Sir Wilfrid Spender to Lady Spender, D1633/1/1/83

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
D1633/1/1/83 My dear Lil The Margut Mortgage business is
destracting & the best suggestion I can make is :—
to offer to sell to the district most of
the balance, telling the sisters to tender their
shares through Stavey & Edmund, still seeing
Con's assent is first obtained. The property is show I hope the others have received their
cheques & and have acknowledged them to you
& that they have quite accepted you as
the new manager in my place. I think
the addresses of both agents are in my book
John Bayly a Cliftowith Chambers
Northdown road. margate
Meath Brooke Smith ?Hown
[questionable reading] St
Strand
our I think the other but the address you can
find off any of the monthly tenancy lists Your loving husband
Wilfred B Spender
"C" Form (
MESSAGES AND SIGNALS. No. of Message
Prefix Code Words Received Sent, or sent out Office Stamp.
£ s. d. From At m
Charges to collect By To
Service Instructions
By
Handed in at the Office, at .m. Received here at .m.
To
superscript textSender's Number. Day of Month. In reply to Number.superscript text AAA
FROM
PLACE
TIME
superscript textThis line should be erased if not required.superscript text
W. 5375-423. 75,000 Pads-12/12-B. & F.-
